en:
Tom wanted a book on the top shelf.
He put a chair near the wall and started to climb.
Suddenly his foot slipped and he fell down.
"Ow! I have hurt my arm!" he cried.
His mother ran in and looked at his arm.
"Have you hurt it badly?" she asked.
"You must be careful. Please don't climb so high again."
cn:
汤姆想要最上层架子上的一本书。
他把一把椅子搬到墙边，开始往上爬。
突然他的脚一滑，摔了下来。
"哎哟！我把胳膊弄伤了！"他喊道。
妈妈跑了进来，看了看他的胳膊。
"你伤得厉害吗？"她问。
"你必须小心点。以后请别再爬那么高了。"

en:
A card arrived this morning.
"It's from Jimmy," Mother said. "He has already reached the camp in the mountains."
"When did he send it?" Sally asked.
"He posted it last Monday," Mother answered.
"Have we received any other news from him yet?"
"Not yet. But he has promised to write again soon."
"Good. I hope his next letter arrives this week."
cn:
今天早上到了一张明信片。
"是吉米寄来的，"妈妈说，"他已经到了山里的营地。"
"他什么时候寄的？"萨莉问。
"他上周一寄出的，"妈妈回答。
"我们还收到他别的消息了吗？"
"还没有。不过他答应很快再写信来。"
"太好了。我希望他的下一封信这周就到。"

en:
"Have you finished the French test?" Paul asked in the corridor.
"Yes, I have," Anna said with a smile.
"It was so difficult! I haven't learnt half of those words," Paul said.
"Have you answered every question?"
"No, I haven't. I left three of them empty."
"Don't worry too much. I have revised for two weeks, so I feel quite calm."
"You are lucky. I really should have revised harder."
cn:
"你考完法语了吗？"保罗在走廊里问。
"考完了，"安娜笑着说。
"太难了！那些单词我一半都没学过，"保罗说。
"你每道题都答了吗？"
"没有。我有三道题空着。"
"别太担心。我复习了两周，所以觉得挺踏实。"
"你真幸运。我真该更用功地复习。"

en:
The teacher is sitting at her desk and marking an essay.
The paper is full of mistakes.
She calls the boy to the front.
"Look, you are listening to music while you are writing," she says.
"That's why you are so careless."
"I'm sorry," the boy answers quietly.
"Please check your work again and correct every mistake."
cn:
老师正坐在办公桌前批改一篇作文。
这篇文章错误百出。
她把男孩叫到前面。
"你看，你一边写作业一边听音乐，"她说。
"这就是你这么粗心的原因。"
"对不起，"男孩小声回答。
"请再检查一遍你的作业，把每一个错误都改正。"

en:
A woman brought a dress back to the shop.
"This dress is too small for me," she said.
"I tried it on at home yesterday, and I couldn't wear it."
"When did you buy it?" the shop girl asked.
"Last week. I was in a hurry, so I didn't check the size."
"Can you change it for a bigger one?"
"Of course. Let me find a larger size for you."
cn:
一位女士把一条连衣裙拿回了店里。
"这条裙子我穿太小了，"她说。
"我昨天在家试穿，根本穿不上。"
"您是什么时候买的？"店员姑娘问。
"上周。我当时太匆忙，没有看尺码。"
"能给我换一件大一号的吗？"
"当然可以。我给您找一个大点儿的尺码。"

en:
It is a fine morning and the whole family is sitting at the table.
"The weather is lovely today," Father says. "I have a good idea."
"We are going to drive to the seaside and have a picnic!"
"That's a wonderful idea!" the children shout.
They run upstairs to prepare their swimming suits.
Mother is packing the food in the kitchen.
"Hurry up, everyone. We are going to leave soon."
cn:
这是一个晴朗的早晨，全家人都坐在餐桌旁。
"今天天气真好，"爸爸说，"我有个好主意。"
"我们打算开车去海边野餐！"
"这主意太棒了！"孩子们喊道。
他们跑上楼去准备泳衣。
妈妈正在厨房里收拾食物。
"大家快点儿。我们马上就要出发了。"

en:
A man is looking at the cameras in the shop.
A shop girl comes to help him.
"The camera on the top shelf is the most expensive model in our shop," she says.
"It has the best pictures and the most useful buttons."
"But it is quite hard to use."
"This one beside it is much cheaper."
"For a beginner, the cheaper model is more suitable."
cn:
一位男士正在店里看相机。
一个店员姑娘过来帮忙。
"最上层架子上的那台是我们店里最贵的型号，"她说。
"它拍出的画质最好，按键也最实用。"
"不过它挺难操作的。"
"它旁边这台要便宜得多。"
"对新手来说，便宜的那款更合适。"
